# WordLift Documentation

>

## Table of Contents

### Documentation

- [Overview | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/): Latest Release: 3.20.4 (May 2026) — Added Data API server-side rendering guidance, including cache-safe integration patterns for structured data publishing.
- [Overview | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/): Latest Release: 3.12.0 (April 2026) - New Google AI Edge wordlift-graphql integration docs and updated integrations for AI-assisted SEO workflows.
- [🛡️ Data Privacy and Security | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/data-privacy-and-security/): At WordLift, we take data privacy and security very seriously. We are committed to safeguarding any data entrusted to us and have implemented robust security measures to ensure its protection.
- [🙋🏽‍♀️ Frequently Asked Questions | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/faq/): How does Agent WordLift work?
- [🚀 Getting Started | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/getting-started/): This guide will walk you through the initial steps of using WordLift AI SEO Agent, your AI-powered SEO companion.
- [💫 Highlights | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/highlights/): Unmatched Accuracy with Knowledge Graph
- [⚙️ Integrations | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/integrations/): Latest Release: 3.12.0 (April 2026) - Added Google AI Edge wordlift-graphql integration docs and video, plus continued improvements for MCP workflows and Knowledge Graph integrations.
- [📚 Prompt Library | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/prompt-reference/): This comprehensive library contains ready-to-use prompts for Agent WordLift, optimized for both the web interface and Chrome extension. Each prompt is formatted for easy copying and immediate use.
- [✨ Tips for using WordLift Agent | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/tips/): Talk to the Agent as your SEO assistant: Provide it with step-by-step instructions.
- [🛠️ Workflows | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/): Here is how WordLift AI SEO Agent can help you boost your productivity in different editorial workflows:
- [Adding Authorship Markup | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/adding-authorship-markup/): In today's SEO landscape, establishing author credibility is crucial. Google's recent updates to Search Quality Rater Guidelines (January 2025) emphasize E-E-A-T principles more than ever. This workflow demonstrates how to leverage Agent WordLift to create comprehensive authorship markup that enhances your content's trustworthiness.
- [Align Content with the Intended Search Query | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/analyzing-query-match/): This workflow is designed to help us align our content with the intended search query to ensure maximum relevance and engagement from our target audience. By understanding and matching the search intent, we can create content that not only ranks well but also satisfies the user's informational needs.
- [Content Quality Evaluation | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/content-evaluation/): The Content Quality Evaluation workflow allows you to comprehensively assess your content across multiple dimensions including quality, readability, and SEO performance. This powerful tool provides actionable insights to improve your content and make it more engaging for both users and search engines.
- [Creating Internal Links | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/create-internal-links/): Internal linking is a critical aspect of SEO, helping to establish site architecture and spread link equity. With WordLift AI SEO Agent, you can streamline the process of creating internal links to enhance your website's SEO and user experience. This guide will walk you through the steps to effectively use Agent WordLift for creating internal links on your website.
- [Create product descriptions using keyword insights | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/create-product-description/): Introduction
- [Create content buckets for Social Media | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/create-social-media-content-buckets/): Introduction
- [Create social media posts using content on your website | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/create-social-media-posts/): Introduction
- [Enhanced Entity Research with Google Knowledge Graph | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/enhanced-entity-research/): Unlock comprehensive entity intelligence by combining Google's Enterprise Knowledge Graph with WordLift's semantic enrichment. This powerful workflow provides 3-5x richer entity data for superior content creation, competitive analysis, and SEO optimization.
- [Generate FAQs | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/faq/): This workflow is designed to help us with the process of creating frequently asked questions (FAQs) based on content from our website and insights from WordLift's AI SEO Agent.
- [Google Search Console Integration | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/google-search-console/): The Google Search Console (GSC) integration enables WordLift Agent to connect directly with Google Search Console API 📈, providing access to search analytics data.
- [Ideas for the Newsletter | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/ideas-for-newsletters/): This workflow is designed to help us create a newsletter that engages the target audience and keeps them informed about a specific topic.
- [Instagram Indexing Analysis | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/instagram-indexing-analysis/): Watch the complete workflow demonstration:
- [Google Instagram Indexing Report | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/instagram-indexing-report/): As of July 10, 2025, Instagram content has switched from "part-indexed" to "fully indexable" in Google Search, making every reel, carousel, and highlight a potential search asset. This workflow demonstrates how to use Agent WordLift as a specialized sub-agent within Claude to analyze Instagram content alignment with your website and organic search rankings.
- [Avoid Keyword Cannibalization | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/keyword-cannibalization/): In this workflow, we'll explore how to identify and resolve keyword cannibalization issues using the WordLift AI SEO Agent. Keyword cannibalization occurs when multiple pages on your website target the same keyword, causing them to compete against each other in search engine rankings. This can dilute your SEO efforts and confuse search engines about which page to rank for the keyword.
- [Run a keyword research | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/keyword-discovery/): Let’s work together on keyword research with WordLift AI SEO Agent. Keyword research provides valuable insight into how a target audience searches on Google. The insight from these queries helps us inform the content strategy and can also be applied to our day-to-day marketing efforts.
- [Local SEO Analysis | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/local-seo-analysis/): Local SEO is critical for businesses that serve specific geographic areas. This workflow demonstrates how to use Agent WordLift's Local SEO tools to analyze and optimize your business's local search presence. For more background on local SEO strategies, read our comprehensive guide: Optimizing Local SEO - How to Create Winning Strategies.
- [Local SEO Tools Reference | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/local-seo-tools-guide/): This guide provides detailed information about Agent WordLift's Local SEO tools, their capabilities, and technical specifications. For a strategic overview of local SEO best practices, see our article on Optimizing Local SEO - How to Create Winning Strategies.
- [Rankings Drop Audit | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/rankings-drop-audit/): The Rankings Drop Audit workflow uses Agent WordLift's Multi-Agent System (MAS) to perform an autonomous, in-depth analysis of ranking drops in your Google Search Console data. Instead of static dashboards, it provides a dynamic reasoning engine that converts raw GSC data into a client-ready, interactive report.
- [Research Content Ideas Using Reddit Discussions | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/agent-wordlift/workflows/research-content-ideas/): Reddit is a powerful platform for SEO research and content ideation. Learn more about leveraging Reddit for SEO in our guide Best Practices, Tips & Strategies.
- [Ask Request | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/agent/ask-request-api-ask-post/): Interact with the WordLift Agent to process a message and receive an AI-driven response.
- [WordLift Agent API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/agent/wordlift-agent-api/): API for interacting with the WordLift Agent
- [Analyse content | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/analyse/): Analyze the content provided with the request.
- [Analyses | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/analyses/): Analyses
- [Analysis | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/analysis/): Analyse content using Linked Data and Knowledge Graphs.
- [Content Expansions | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/content-expansions/): Content Expansions
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/create-content-expansion/): Create a Content Expansion
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/create-entity-gap/): Create an Entity Gaps analysis.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/create/): Create an analysis request
- [Entity Gaps | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/entity-gaps/): Entity Gaps
- [Analyse and Merge | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/merge/): Analyze content and return the results merged as HTML code.
- [Analyse Web Page | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/analysis/v-2-analysis/): Analyse the content of a webpage by using the `url` property of the request.
- [Website Audit | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/audit/audit-website/): Performs a comprehensive SEO and AI-readiness audit of a specified URL. The audit analyzes:
- [WordLift Audit API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/audit/wordlift-audit-api/): The WordLift Audit API provides comprehensive SEO and AI-readiness analysis for websites.
- [Classification | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/classification/classification/): Generic text classification
- [Classifications | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/classification/classifications/): Classifications
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/classification/classify-using-post/): Classify the text to provided categories
- [Evaluate Content | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-evaluations/evaluate-content-api-content-evaluations-post/): Submit text content for evaluation.
- [WordLift Content Evaluations API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-evaluations/wordlift-content-evaluations-api/): API for evaluating text content based on specific criteria.
- [Content Generation Completion | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-completion/): Content Generation Completion
- [Content Generation Fields | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-fields/): Content Generation Fields
- [Content Generation Models | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-models/): Content Generation Models
- [Content Generation Presets | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-presets/): Content Generation Presets
- [Content Generation Records Export | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-records-export/): Content Generation Records Export
- [Content Generation Records | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-records/): Content Generation Records
- [Content Generation Renders | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-renders/): Content Generation Renders
- [Content Generation Stats | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-stats/): Content Generation Stats
- [Content Generation Syncs | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-syncs/): Content Generation Syncs
- [Content Generation Word biases | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation-word-biases/): Content Generation Word biases
- [Content Generation | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generation/): Generate completions based on customized linguistic models.
- [Content Generations | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/content-generations/): Content Generations
- [Copy | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/copy-rules/): Copy
- [Create a completion | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-completion/): [GET with body payload](https://opensource.zalando.com/restful-api-guidelines/#get-with-body) - no resources created
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-content-generation/): Create
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-question-and-answer/): Create
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-questions-and-answers-collection/): Create
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-rule/): Create
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-sync/): Create
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-word/): Create
- [Update from CSV | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-words-from-csv/): Update from CSV
- [Update for prompt | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/create-words/): Send a list of word biases for this prompt. Existing words will be deleted.
- [Delete | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/delete-content-generation/): Delete
- [Delete | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/delete-question-and-answer/): Delete

- [Delete | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/delete-word/): Delete

- [Get | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/get-questions-and-answers/): Get

- [Get | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/get/): Get

- [List | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/list-records/): List
- [List | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/list-rules/): List
- [List | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/list-words/): List

- [Rules | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/rules/): Rules
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-content-generation/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-question-and-answer/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-questions-and-answers-collection/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-record/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-records-collection/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-records/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-rule-collection/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-rule/): Update
- [Update | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/content-generation/update-word/): Update
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/events/create-event/): Create an event
- [Events | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/events/events/): An API to record and query events raised by clients in order to facilitate KPI tracking.
- [List | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/events/list-events/): List the events bound to the authenticated account.
- [Plugin Events | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/events/plugin-events/): Plugin Events
- [Submit a fact-checking request | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/fact-check/submit-fact-check/): Submit a fact-checking request
- [WordLift Fact-Checking API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/fact-check/wordlift-fact-checking-api/): API for semi-automated fact-checking. Returns schema.org/ClaimReview markup. This markup is structured data that contains information about the fact check -- for example, what was the claim being assessed, who made the claim, what was the verdict.
- [Submit a KPI job | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/create-job-kpi-graphs-graph-id-jobs-post/): Creates or reuses a KPI calculation job for the requested graph and snapshot day. When the latest source watermark, worker major.minor version, and validation-policy fingerprint match the newest validated snapshot, the service completes the request immediately by cloning that snapshot instead of running the worker. Set `force_rerun=true` to bypass reuse and require a fresh worker run.
- [Get job status | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/get-job-kpi-graphs-graph-id-jobs-job-id-get/): Returns the current persisted job state, including operational timestamps, stage, heartbeat, counters, and stage timings.
- [Get one daily KPI snapshot | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/get-snapshot-kpi-graphs-graph-id-snapshots-date-get/): Returns the complete daily KPI snapshot for a graph, including graph-wide `all_` / `public_` / `private_` metrics and the public-only SHACL validation outputs.
- [jobs | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/jobs/): jobs
- [List jobs for a graph | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/list-jobs-for-graph-kpi-graphs-graph-id-jobs-get/): Returns persisted jobs for one graph ordered by most recently updated first. Use the opaque `cursor` token from a previous page to continue pagination.
- [List daily KPI snapshots | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/list-snapshots-kpi-graphs-graph-id-snapshots-get/): Returns a time-series of daily graph KPI snapshots for a single public graph identifier. Use the `metrics` query parameter to request a compact projection suitable for charts.
- [snapshots | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/snapshots/): snapshots
- [WordLift Graph KPI API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graph-kpi/wordlift-graph-kpi-api/): Historical graph KPI ancillary service for WordLift knowledge graphs.
- [GraphQL | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graphql/graph-ql/): GraphQL
- [GraphQL support | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graphql/graphql-support/): GraphQL endpoint to query Knowledge Graphs
- [Query | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/graphql/graphql-using-post/): Query
- [Google Search Console - URL Inspections | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/gsc-url-inspections/google-search-console-url-inspections/): API for requesting Google Search Console URL inspections via WordLift Manager API.
- [Google Search Console | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/gsc-url-inspections/google-search-console/): Google Search Console
- [Inspect a URL using Google Search Console | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/gsc-url-inspections/post-gsc-url-inspections/): Inspect a URL using Google Search Console
- [Inspect | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/inspector/get/): Inspect a URL to perform a variety of tasks defined by the list of applied filters.
- [Inspection | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/inspector/inspection/): Inspect web pages for structured data.
- [Inspector | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/inspector/inspector/): Inspector
- [Microdata to JSON-LD | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/inspector/microdata-to-json-ld/): Provided a URL, converts any microdata found on that URL to JSON-LD.
- [Microdata | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/inspector/microdata/): Microdata
- [Get by id | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/get-1/): Get a Web Async response by id.
- [Get entities | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/get-2/): Query for long tail opportunities and receive entities.
- [Get entities by rank (async) | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/get-3/): Query for long tail opportunities and receive entities along with their position in SERP.
- [Get entities by rank | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/get-v-2/): Query for long tail opportunities and receive entities along with their position in SERP.
- [Get by id | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/get/): Get a Web Async operation by its id.
- [List | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/list/): List all Web Async operations.
- [Long Tail | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/long-tail/): Provide suggestions for long tail opportunities.
- [Long Tails | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/long-tails/): Long Tails
- [Web Asyncs metadata | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/web-asyncs-metadata/): Web Asyncs metadata
- [Web Asyncs responses | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/long-tail/web-asyncs-responses/): Web Asyncs responses
- [Account - Google Search Console | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/account-google-search-console/): Account - Google Search Console
- [Account Stats | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/account-stats/): Account Stats
- [Account | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/account/): Account
- [Accounts | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/accounts/): Accounts
- [AddOns | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/add-ons/): AddOns
- [Analytics Imports | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/analytics-imports/): Analytics Imports
- [Analytics syncs | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/analytics-syncs/): Analytics syncs
- [Authors | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/authors/): Authors
- [Botify Crawl Imports | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/botify-crawl-imports/): Botify Crawl Imports
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-analytics-import/): Create a Analytics Import using Google Search Console or Botify depending on the Account configuration.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-analytics-sync/): Create and run analytics sync
- [Get an Access Code | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-auth-code-exchange/): Call this API to have the Platform receive an Authentication Token to access the Analytics data via Google Search Console.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-author/): Creates the structured data for an author.
- [Create an Authorization URI | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-authorize-uri/): Call this API to get an authorization URI needed to interactively get an authorization token. Then call the `exchangeAuthCode` to exchange it with an authorization token.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-botify-crawl-import/): Create a Botify Crawl Import
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-embedding/): Create the embedding for the IRIs for the provided query.
- [Suggest | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-internal-link-suggestion/): Create an Internal Links suggestion.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-internal-link/): Create Internal Links.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-merchant/): Create a Merchant
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-o-auth-2-authorized-client/): Create a OAuth2 Authorized Client
- [Create or update the Platform Consumption | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-or-update-my-platform-consumption/): Create or update the Platform Consumption for the authenticated user.
- [Create Platform Limit | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-platform-limit/): Create a platform limit.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-query/): Create

- [Start | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-sync/): Start
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-url-inspection/): Inspect a URL using the Google Search Console connected to the authenticated account.
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-vector-search-question/): Create
- [Create | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/create-web-page-imports/): Create a Web Page Import

- [Delete an authorization | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/delete-authorization/): Retrieve the authorizations of the authenticated user.
- [Delete by id | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/delete-merchant/): Delete a Merchant by its `id`.
- [Delete | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/delete-o-auth-2-authorized-client/): Delete a OAuth2 Authorized Client given its client registration id
- [Delete Platform Consumption by ID | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/delete-platform-consumption-by-id/): Allow admins to delete platform consumptions.
- [Delete Platform Consumption | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/delete-platform-consumption/): Allow admins to delete platform consumptions.
- [Delete Platform Limit | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/delete-platform-limit/): Delete a platform limit.
- [Duplicate the Google Search Console connection through accounts | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/duplicate/): Call this API to duplicate an existing google search console connection to another accounts.
- [Embedding | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/embedding/): Embedding
- [Get an account. | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/api/manager/get-account/): Get the account

- [Content Generation | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/content-generation/): Welcome to the world of content creation at scale, where challenges abound in harnessing the potential of Large Language Models (LLMs). These powerful language models possess vast knowledge but also suffer from a critical flaw: they don't know what they know. However, a solution lies within the data-rich landscape of knowledge graphs. By leveraging the data within these graphs built using WordLift, we can steer the model's knowledge, curtail hallucinations, and establish a robust validation pipeline.
- [API Guide | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/content-generation/api-guide/): Introduction
- [IP & User-Agent Whitelist | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/developer-resources/ip-user-agent-whitelist/): To allow WordLift to correctly analyze a customer website, please ensure the following IP addresses and user-agent are whitelisted in your firewall, WAF, or bot-management rules.
- [Developer API Guide | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/developer-resources/monitoring/): This document describes how to query monitor results for a specific URL.
- [Custom Domain Configuration | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/enterprise/custom-domain-configuration/): Configure a customer-owned domain for WordLift Enterprise Knowledge Graph dataset URIs using a CNAME record or a reverse proxy.
- [Enterprise Onboarding Guide | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/enterprise/onboarding/): A practical onboarding playbook for Enterprise teams adopting WordLift as part of their Knowledge Graph, SEO, data, and AI operations.
- [SAML Single Sign-On for Enterprise | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/enterprise/saml-sso/): WordLift supports SAML-based single sign-on for Enterprise customers who want centralized identity management with their supported identity provider.
- [Knowledge Graph | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/): The Knowledge Graph constitutes the basic representation of the Knowledge Domain for a website or an account.
- [Analytics API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/analytics-api/): Introduction
- [Botify Crawl Imports | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/botify/): Use the Botify Crawl Imports endpoint (https://api.wordlift.io/botify-crawl-imports) to populate a Knowledge Graph with data from Botify.
- [Data API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/data-api/): The Data API publishes the structured data for a web page from the WordLift Knowledge Graph.
- [KG-REST | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/kg-rest/): A RESTful API for interacting with and managing knowledge graphs. KG-REST provides a standardized interface to perform operations on complex graph-based data, making it easier to create, read, update, and delete graph elements while supporting batch processing and query-based interactions.
- [Multilingual | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/multilingual/): Each website is linked to a Graph and every Graph is configured with one language and optionally a country.
- [Sitemap Import API | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/sitemap-import/): It is possible to jumpstart a Knowledge Graph by importing the URLs from a simple sitemap.xml file (i.e. a sitemap with a list of URLs; sitemap.xml with references to other sitemap files isn't yet supported). It is also possible to specify a list of URLs.
- [Web Page Import | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/knowledge-graph/web-page-import/): The Web Page Import API allows you to transform unstructured web content into structured data within your Knowledge Graph. By providing a URL, the service automatically retrieves the page content, extracts the core information, and represents it as a Knowledge Graph entity.
- [AI & LLM Integrations | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/llm-connectors/): WordLift offers a set of integrations to build AI-powered marketing workflows using semantic intelligence.
- [LlamaIndex & LangChain - WordLift Reader | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/llm-connectors/wordlift-reader/): WordLift Reader is a robust connector for the LlamaHub library, compatible with LlamaIndex and LangChain. The WordLift Reader interacts explicitly with any Knowledge Graph built using WordLift, transforming semantically structured data into engaging conversations by bringing data into LlamaIndex and LangChain, two popular frameworks for developing Large Language Model (LLM) applications.
- [Llama Index - WordLift Vector Store | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/llm-connectors/wordlift-vector-store/): WordLift Vector Store is a Knowledge Graph-based Vector SLlamaIndex. This integration enables WordLift to be used as a vector store for LlamaIndex, allowing you to work with your knowledge graph directly from your codebase.
- [Introduction | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/looker-studio-connector/introduction/): With the WordLift Looker Studio Connector, you can create semantic SEO reports by loading data from your Knowledge Graph directly into Looker Studio and merging it with Search Console or any other web analytics platform.
- [BrightEdge | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/marketing-automation/brightedge/introduction/): BrightEdge focuses on automating structured data markup at the page level. WordLift, instead, is designed to build and maintain a Knowledge Graph that acts as a centralized semantic layer for the organization. Schema markup is one of the outputs of that graph, but not the objective itself. The primary goal is to create stable entities, identities, and relationships that persist across pages, channels, and use cases.
- [Introduction | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/marketing-automation/power-automate/introduction/): The WordLift Power Automate Connector allows you to integrate your Knowledge Graph data with the Microsoft Power Platform. This connector provides access to the WordLift GraphQL API, enabling you to extract and utilize entity data across Power Automate, Logic Apps, and Power Apps.
- [Introduction | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/marketing-automation/zapier/introduction/): The WordLift Zapier Integration allows you to automate your semantic SEO workflows by connecting WordLift with over 6,000+ apps. You can now leverage the power of Agent WordLift and your Knowledge Graph data across your entire marketing stack.
- [About WordLift | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/about/): WordLift brings the power of Artificial Intelligence to web publishers around the World.
- [Analysis | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/analysis/): WordLift suggests to the content editor relevant fact-based information, images and links to organize and enrich contents.
- [APIs | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/api/): To learn more about our API, head over to our Wordlift API Guide for more information.
- [Discover | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/discover/): WordLift brings to the readers of your site multiple means of content discovery.
- [Edit Entity | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/edit-entity/): WordLift uses entities to annotate and organize blog posts and pages.

- [Features | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/features/): WordLift is a semantic editor for WordPress to help writing, organizing, tagging and sharing content online.
- [Export & Import of the Vocabulary | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/import-export-vocabulary/): There are several cases where a user decides to export or import the vocabulary of terms created with WordLift. Let’s see them in details:
- [Installation | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/installation/): We suggest our users to make a full back-up of their website data before installing WordLift.
- [JSON-LD | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/jsonld/): The plugin generates JSON-LD markup to improve the visibility of web pages in search engine results pages (SERPs). It uses natural language processing and machine learning algorithms to identify important concepts within the content and map them to relevant schema.org entities, creating a semantically rich representation of the page. This structured data provides search engines with more information about the content of the page, leading to better rankings and a richer search experience for users.
- [Key Concepts | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/key-concepts/): Here is the terminology describing the core concepts that will help you set up and manage your content with WordLift:
- [Mappings | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/mappings/): Mappings are designed to help us organize and structure content while improving the SEO on our website.
- [Overview | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/overview/): WordLift brings the power of Artificial Intelligence to web publishers around the World.
- [Product Knowledge Graph Builder | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/pkg-builder/): Product KG Builder is the feature for e-commerce that allows you to automate your SEO and create a product knowledge graph with your Google Merchant Feed.
- [Publish | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/publish/): Publish Entity
- [Publishing | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/publishing/): Rich Snippets

Here you can keep track of everything that is happening with the developemnt of the plugin: read the changelog and discover fixes and enhancements.
- [Semantics Analytics | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/semantic-analytics/): You can use WordLift to create an entity-based Web Analytics Dashboard using Google Data Studio and traffic data from Google Analytics.
- [Shortcodes | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/shortcodes/): WordLift provides several useful shortcodes to provide enhanced visualizations on your web site.
- [Sidebar | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/sidebar/): Content Analysis and Disambiguation
- [Troubleshooting | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/troubleshooting/): In rare cases, you might receive an error message when installing or updating WordLift. Here are some of the issues we gathered from our clients.
- [Widgets | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/widgets/): Context Cards
- [WordLift Theme Development | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/pages/wordlift-theme-development/): Who should read this
- [Feed Specifications | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/product-knowledge-graph-builder/feed-specifications/): Mapping Between Google Merchant Product Properties and Schema.org Properties
- [Introduction | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/product-knowledge-graph-builder/introduction/): Product KG Builder is the feature for e-commerce that allows you to automate your SEO and create a Product Knowledge Graph with your Google Merchant Feed.
- [Webhooks | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/product-knowledge-graph-builder/webhooks/): What is a webhook? A webhook is a method used to send real-time data updates from one application to another as soon as an event occurs. It allows for seamless integration and communication between systems by automatically triggering a callback when specific events take place.
- [Search the documentation | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/search/)
- [Introduction | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/seo-add-on-google-sheets/introduction/): SEO Add-on for Google Sheets™ by WordLift is the extension that allows you to perform semantic keyword research and entity analysis, and create a JSON-LD to help Google understand what your content is about.
- [Introduction | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/woocommerce/introduction/): WooCommerce SEO by WordLift has been specifically designed for e-commerce websites running on WordPress with WooCommerce.
- [agent | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/agent/): Launch external agent CLIs with worai MCP server + skills.
- [canonicalize-duplicate-pages | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/canonicalize-duplicate-pages/): Choose canonical URLs based on WordLift entity type+name and GSC KPIs.
- [canonicals | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/canonicals/): Canonical URL workflows backed by SDK Search Console impressions.
- [dedupe | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/dedupe/): Find duplicated WordLift entities by schema:url and delete duplicates.
- [delete-entities-from-csv | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/delete-entities-from-csv/): Delete entities listed in a CSV file (first column = IRI).
- [find-faq-page-wrong-type | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/find-faq-page-wrong-type/): Find entities with schemaFAQPage type. Optionally patch.
- [find-missing-names | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/find-missing-names/): List CollectionPage entities missing schemaheadline.
- [find-url-by-type | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/find-url-by-type/): Extract schema:url values from a Turtle graph for one or more schema types.
- [google-search-console | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/google-search-console/): Export Google Search Console page metrics to CSV for 7d, 28d, and 3m windows.
- [graph | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/graph/): Run graph-specific workflows.
- [link-groups | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/link-groups/): Convert a link-group CSV to RDF and optionally apply changes via WordLift API.
- [list-entities-outside-dataset | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/list-entities-outside-dataset/): List entities that do not belong to the account dataset.
- [patch | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/patch/): Patch WordLift entities from RDF (Turtle or JSON-LD).
- [self | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/self/): Manage worai CLI update workflows.
- [seocheck | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/seocheck/): Run SEO checks against URLs found in a sitemap. Supports remote sitemap URLs and local files.
- [seoreport | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/seoreport/): Generate an SEO performance report from Google Search Console, optionally enriched with GA4 Analytics (Web vs AI).
- [structured-data | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/structured-data/): Generate JSON-LD/YARRRML mappings or materialize RDF from YARRRML using Playwright-rendered pages.
- [upload-entities-from-turtle | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/upload-entities-from-turtle/): Upload .ttl/.turtle files to WordLift /entities with resume support.
- [validate | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/validate/): Deprecated JSON-LD validation commands. Prefer worai graph validate for RDF files/URLs.
- [web-pages | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/commands/web-pages/): Run ingestion-backed workflows for web pages.
- [Configuration | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/configuration/): Config files
- [Install and Quickstart | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/worai/install/): Install
- [Welcome | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/wordpress-plugin/): The main documentation for getting started with WordLift is organized in the following sections:
- [Advanced Topics | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/wordpress-plugin/advanced-topics/): Knowledge Graph
- [Customization and Development | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/wordpress-plugin/customization-and-development/): - APIs
- [Getting Started | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/wordpress-plugin/getting-started/): We suggest our users to make a full back-up of their website data before installing WordLift.
- [Support | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/wordpress-plugin/support/): Where to ask for support
- [Troubleshooting | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/wordpress-plugin/troubleshooting/): Author's @id is null
- [User Manual | WordLift Developer Documentation](https://docs.wordlift.io/wordpress-plugin/user-manual/): - Editors
